programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay takes on a time warp at the Handlebar restaurant and lounge in Mount Sinai, New York, where the owners are stuck in the 80s with an unenthusiastic chef.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: The comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West returns. Maggie and Eddie haven't spoken for a year, until they're reunited as bridesmaids at a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. Maggie and Whitney lock horns over Eddie's affection as they go on an odyssey across London to secure tickets to a drag show.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Greater Manchester, there are chaotic kitchens, couples' karaoke, army commands and a charm offensive, as three couples compete to host the best dinner party.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: Up a long garden path in Leeds lies a Victorian villa that's been a labour of love for Jawad and Charlie. And in Brixton, George hopes for a clean sweep with a redundant chimney.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipe Hunter: At Diane's insistence, Sam invites Frasier to join the boys on a fishing trip, during which they send him into the woods on a 'snipe hunt'.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam thinks he's scored some brownie points by agreeing to pitch in a charity softball game, but his over-competitive nature earns him a lecture from Diane.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam joins a geography class so that he can pass his high school diploma. Coach helps him to study, but he finds an easier way to progress: by dating the teacher.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Frank backs into Robert's police car, Debra decides that he's not a safe driver and the kids should no longer travel in his car.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra decides to undermine the babysitter's popularity when she finds out how much the children like her, but all does not go to plan.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray embarrasses Debra at a school auction but then worries about the ways in which she could get revenge.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier turns his hand to DIY when he helps out with a local homebuilding scheme. Unfortunately, his plans are rather too grand..

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles search for a new coffee house when they're annoyed by a street singer (guest star Elvis Costello) who starts playing at Café Nervosa.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's jealous when he finds out about his former agent Bebe's relationship with his old friend Dr Phil (guest starring as himself).

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin worries that he might not be Frasier and Niles's dad when he notices the similarities that they share with his wife's former colleague.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon attempts to revamp an inconsistent country club and golf course restaurant in New Jersey. It's dark, it's gloomy and the food's attracting complaints.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Simon O'Brien discovers an old pedal cycle with a difference: it's got a two-stroke engine attached. And Henry Cole finds a side table made from a war shell case.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers head to stunning Ushaw House, get a glimpse of the treasures buried with a saint and help out at an alpaca farm in the Durham Dales.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King helps Jenny buy her first-ever property - in San Antonio on Ibiza. Can Leah find the perfect apartment close to the beach for Jenny's £250k.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In France, Nadine and Simon cook up new ideas to expand their glamping business. In Spain, Joel and Cori launch a brand-new venture.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Lionel and Claire take on a luxury en-suite. Alison and Zion rebuild a top-floor apartment. Tim and Sasha prepare for not one but two huge weddings.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Can the Garners help Alison and John find the perfect villa in Almería? On the Costa Blanca, the Aldertons show Hollywood casting director Nancy a sleek ultra-modern home.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Danny and Danielle take on a mansion with spectacular views, and spectacular problems. Can Aled and Sarah get their auction abode ready for their wedding.

programme.title: Grayson Perry Has Seen the Future
programme.desc: Grayson meets the co-founder of the popular AI app Anthropic and a scientist working on empathetic robots, and creates a new artwork inspired by his tech adventure.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can new owner Stephanie give up the ghosts of MacGregor's past.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old Sara is rushed to A&E after collapsing at work with a thunderclap headache. And Flynn was hit by a car while riding his bike and has hurt his leg.

programme.title: Rescue: Extreme Medics
programme.desc: Elite clinicians race to save lives in challenging locations across Scotland. Rally driver Scott has rolled down a 20-foot embankment on Mull.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Peter's Italian Restaurant in New York, where the peace of Long Island is shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family who run the place.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Marseille
programme.desc: Join Asim Chaudhry and Joe Lycett for le weekend in Marseille. Expect street food, skateboarding, submerged sculpture, and spectacular sights from atop the Basilica Notre-Dame de la Garde.

programme.title: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Comedy with Tiffany Haddish and Rose Byrne. When two friends' beauty business gets into dire financial difficulty, they turn to a scary CEO for help.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: On Merseyside, George has radical ideas to redesign an Edwardian home. In Surrey, he tackles a Victorian country house that has accrued some bizarre additions over the years.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, three couples compete with holiday-inspired menus, in a week featuring a sweaty confession, an underwhelming paella and an alpha male arm wrestle.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the Isle of Wight, restorer Ronnie relives his past life in Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When Cliff gets ill, Norm helps him by delivering the mail, but gets arrested for allegedly tampering with the post.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An absurd bet that Sam made during his wild days comes back to haunt him when the man he made the wager with shows up. If Sam can't triumph, he must forfeit the bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's reputation as a ladies' man takes a battering when a journalist comes to the bar to report on Boston's singles scene and is irked by his smugness.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's shocked when she suddenly realises that she wishes her own mother was more like Marie..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra thinks that it's Ray's turn to take charge of birth control, so he decides to have his 'wires cut', but then chickens out..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert decides that he's too old to be living with his parents, so he moves in with another elderly couple - who turn out to be carbon copies of Frank and Marie.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier shares an unexpected kiss with Julia while trying to steal files from her ex's office. Niles enjoys a trip to the shooting range more than he expected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz prepares to leave the radio station and join a rival company, but not before voicing her concerns about Frasier's new relationship with Julia.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz isn't happy when the station announces that it's found her replacement. But if she stays, she'll have to put up with Frasier's new romance.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A Man, a Plan, and a Gal - Julia: Daphne and Niles have an important announcement to make, but Frasier's girlfriend steals their thunder.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to transform New Jersey Italian restaurant Da Mimmo, which is run by a mother and her three sons - two of whom see the business as a failure..

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In North Wales, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Emma, whose father ran a haulage and motor repair business, to see what unloved items they can restore.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers help to prep award-winning animals at the Northumberland County Show, and visit stunning historical Corbridge.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lizzie and Paul love the seaside town of Paphos on Cyprus's west coast. Can Ben Hillman find them the perfect holiday home for the whole family, including their 10 grandkids, for £125k.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: There's a change in direction for Andy and Jules's Spanish cycle adventure business. On the Costa Cálida, mini golf course owner Ian launches a new tournament.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul dabble with DIY danger. Debbie and Dave overhaul a barn to launch a craft business. Tim and Krys revive a bland reception.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Andy and Kathy accidentally sold their house in the UK! Can the Garners find them their forever in in Almería? In Murcia, the Browns help Debbie and Jordan find a coastal escape.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: On the French Riviera, Paul takes control of a steam loco on the stunning Pine Cone line and rides in the cab of millionaire businessman Paul Ricard's private line.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne treats the contestants to a song, but not everyone appreciates it. A grunting Kumail Nanjiani embraces Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they quiz him about a horse.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. In her haste to grab an olive branch, Maggie takes the wrong meds, which makes being there for Eddie infinitely more chaotic.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. When Maggie reunites with her estranged famous dad, Eddie pressures Maggie to let Whitney use him for Instagram clout.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Self-professed 'crazy camel lady' Sandra wants a mature man to ride off into the sunset with. Pansexual erotic writer Toni-Ann dreams of being the heroine in her own sexy novel.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Nicolle and Ben spice things up, but is Nicolle as happy with the night's climax as she seems? Thrill-seekers Katey and Dan pursue a live sex show experience.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Bijou New York diner The Mixing Bowl is haemorrhaging money thanks to manager Mike's out-of-control marketing plans. Can Gordon get things back on track.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Edinburgh locals perform the one song that tells their story - from the tune a 22-year-old played at his mum's funeral to the Zach Bryan track that helped an ex-soldier with his PTSD.
